_comment: Heng Yue Sect (横岳宗) — Wang Lin's first sect, located on the highest peak of Zhao Country's mountains. Sword-arts specialization (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L23, F01). Secretly led by Huang Long Zhenren / 5th-Gen Vermilion Bird Lu Yun (N25). Canon: Wang Lin entered as outer disciple, rose through betrayal, eventually returned as Soul Formation to rebury the dead. Stand-in: plains village; final: custom sect-complex NBT with sword-training halls, spirit herb gardens, sword-aligned spirit vein beneath main hall.
